participant_id.Description: The BIDS participant label for the scan.

session_id.Description: The BIDS session label for the scan.

average_rating.Description: Mean rating (0 - 1) of four independent slices from visual inspection of T1-weighted images by two independent raters.

classification.Description: Consensus label derived from the average rating. Pass means all slices were approved, Fail means all slices were rejected, and Artifact means between 1 and 3 slices contained artifacts.

Levels.Artifact: Between 1 and 3 slices contained artifacts (average rating 0.25-0.75).

lh_euler.Description: Euler characteristic of the left hemisphere surface from FreeSurfer reconstruction. Less negative values indicate fewer topological defects.

rh_euler.Description: Euler characteristic of the right hemisphere surface from FreeSurfer reconstruction. Less negative values indicate fewer topological defects.

mean_euler.Description: Mean of the left and right hemisphere Euler characteristics from FreeSurfer surface reconstruction.

qc_determination.Description: Final T1w QC call derived from the manual consensus classification.

Levels.artifact: Some artifacts present; use with caution.
Levels.fail: The scan fails QC and should be excluded from T1w-derived analyses.
Levels.pass: The scan passes QC and can be used in T1w-derived analyses.
